item.title: No 10 says 'nothing off the table' over new US tariffs as UK could be among worst hit
item.description: Downing Street says discussions are ongoing following US President Donald Trump's announcement of a 15% global tariffs.

item.title: Teen guilty of belonging to banned neo-Nazi group
item.description: The boy, 16, is also convicted of the possession of terror documents and sharing terror publications.

item.title: Benfica's Prestianni gets provisional one-match ban after alleged racial abuse
item.description: Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni receives a provisional one-match Uefa suspension after Real Madrid's Vinicius Jr reported alleged racist abuse during la...

item.title: Benfica's Prestianni gets provisional one-match ban after Vinicius incident
item.description: Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni receives a provisional one-match Uefa suspension after Real Madrid's Vinicius Jr reported alleged racist abuse during la...

item.title: Why Leeds would be flying high without league-worst late-goal record
item.description: After conceding another late goal on Saturday, we look at the stats that show Leeds would be seventh in the Premier League if games ended after 85 min...
